summary: Complete testing of multi-select filters, group by date, and dynamic automation columns. All features working correctly. Multi-select filter dropdowns show checkboxes, support multiple selections with OR logic. Group by date shows section headers with date label, value, and count. Automations dynamically build watch/condition/action fields from columns array including custom columns.

tests.test: Filter button opens dropdown with checkboxes
Dropdown shows all options for column (13 for blank_status)
Multiple checkboxes can be selected simultaneously
Filter button shows count '2 sel.' when multiple selected
Orders filtered correctly with OR logic (HOLD OR CONTADO/PICKED)
Group dropdown shows options: Sin agrupar, Fecha de entrega, Fecha de creacion, Cancel Date
Selecting 'Fecha de entrega' groups orders by due_date
Date group headers show: label (Entrega), date value (3/15/2026), count (2)
Orders appear under correct date group sections
Clear button resets grouping to 'Sin agrupar'
Watch field dropdown includes all select/checkbox columns dynamically
Watch field dropdown includes custom 'SCREENS' checkbox column
Condition field dropdown includes all select/checkbox columns
Action 'assign_field' dropdown includes all select/checkbox columns
Custom columns appear in all automation dropdowns

multi_select_filters.filter_ui: Filter buttons show 'Todas' by default, change to selected value or 'N sel.' for multiple
multi_select_filters.filter_logic: Array-based OR logic within same field (value.includes(o[key]))

group_by_date.header_styling: bg-primary/10 text-primary border-b with calendar icon

seed_data_creation: Created 5 test orders with different blank_status values (HOLD, CONTADO/PICKED, PARTIAL) and due_dates (2026-03-15, 2026-03-20, 2026-03-25) for testing filters and grouping
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-select filters, group by date, and dynamic automation columns all working. Custom checkbox column 'SCREENS' appears in automation dropdowns. Filter logic uses array.includes() for OR within same field. Test data: 5 orders in SCHEDULING board with varied blank_status and due_date values.
